summary: Completed comprehensive e2e testing of Fixture Intelligence Platform (iteration 3). All new features working correctly: (1) Branding updated to 'FIXTURE INTELLIGENCE' (no 'AI' suffix) across Login, Register, Sidebar, (2) ANY change to clause/recap creates new version with changed_fields tracked, (3) last_modified_by_name + role + timestamp visible on detail pages, (4) Activity Log tab per entity with When/Who/Action/Details columns. Backend: 16/16 tests passed. Frontend: All critical flows verified.
critical_code_review_comments: Branding correctly updated: 'FIXTURE INTELLIGENCE' with 'CONTRACT · RECAP · CLAUSE' tagline (no 'AI' suffix)
Clause versioning on ANY change working: title-only, tags-only, category-only changes all create new versions
Approval-only changes correctly do NOT create new versions (tracked in audit only)
changed_fields array correctly populated in ClauseVersion and Version models
last_modified_by, last_modified_by_name, last_modified_by_role, last_modified_at fields present on Clause and Recap
Linking clauses and approval actions bump last_modified_* on recap
Activity Log tab on Clause Detail shows When/Who/Action/Details columns with audit entries
Version History sidebar shows 'Δ field1, field2' in orange for changed_fields
Recap Versions tab shows changed_fields with diff highlighting (red/green)
seed_data_creation: Test data created via backend tests with TEST_V3_ prefix
context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 3 features fully tested. Backend tests in /app/backend/tests/test_fip_api_v3.py cover: service name rebrand, clause versioning on title/tags/category changes, approval-only not creating versions, last_modified fields, changed_fields tracking, activity log per entity. Frontend verified via Playwright: Login/Register/Sidebar branding, Clause Library 'Modified by' display, Clause Detail LAST MODIFIED badge + tabs + version history with Δ changed_fields, Recap Detail LAST MODIFIED badge + Versions tab with changed_fields diff.
